title: Application and Support Engineer
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The ideal candidate shall work alongside with sales team to provide supports on customer’s vision-based solution for automation and inspection systems. Responsibilities include collaborating with clients to assess needs, developing image processing algorithms, selecting appropriate hardware/software, and ensuring system integration. The role involves troubleshooting, system calibration, and testing to meet quality standards. Expertise in image processing, optical systems, and machine learning is essential, along with proficiency in imaging software like Zebra Matrox Imaging. Strong problem-solving, technical support skills, and effective communication are key, with occasional travel for client installations, training, and maintenance.

ESSENTIAL ACCOUNTABILITIES

· Assist customers in hardware selection and system configurations of machine vision systems.

· Identify and resolve technical issues, minimizing downtime.

· Develop machine vision applications. Manage application projects, ensure timely completion.

· Conduct Vision Education Program training to customer.

· Write application reports, user manuals, application notes, etc.

· Work closely with sales, product marketing, R&D and customer support teams.

· Stay updated with industry trends and maintain industry knowledge.

· Perform other duties as requested.

QUALIFICATIONS

· Bachelor's degree in engineering, computer science, or a related field

· Proven experience in machine vision technology

· Strong knowledge of machine vision software frameworks and libraries, such as OpenCV, Matrox Imaging Library (MIL), Halcon, etc.

· Experience in programming languages will be a plus such as C++, C#, .Net, Python for machine vision application development

· Familiarity with industrial automation, robotics, and manufacturing processes is highly desirable.

· Committed attitude and positive approach, punctuality, and reliability.

· A keen interest in continuing to develop in machine vision industry.

postedCompany.description: Soda Vision Pte Ltd, incorporated since 2012 is a value-added technology company distributing machine vision components and imaging technologies. Based in Singapore with extensive sales network across South-East Asia region, we supply machine vision components and provide expertise for the integration of your vision application. We offer more than a decade of imaging experiences to help develop your unique and cutting-edge solutions. Based on our wide knowledge acquired from distributing a full range of machine vision components, we are capable of providing you with integrated solutions and the perfect price to performance ratio of camera, lens, illumination, frame grabbers, cabling, software, industrial PCs and so much more.
postedCompany.name: SODA VISION PTE. LTD.
